content: What does it even do ?
i check but it doesnt seem to increase the dmg
74k counter with OE means 370k dmg

it increase counters of all awakers by 30%
just as it says
the word here isnt
its phrased very wrong and misleading

I don't get what you don't get
it just increases the counter of all awakers by 30%
maybe that's why you have 70K counters in 7 turns ?
how would you phrase it better and neater than that ?
okay so heres the fixed dmg part
if u phrased it fixed counter dealt shouldnt it increase the dmg dealt here ?
Fixed Counter and Fixed DMG are two different things

no
your awakers deal a certain percentage of counter, so you get a certain percentage of counter.
If the counters stacks should deal more damage, it would have been the counter stacks dealing +30% damages

it said counter dmg right i understand its suppose to increase the counter on the exalt 
and not the deal fixed dmg part but does it feel wrong ?

wording is indeed not perfect in morimens ^^ 
and it changes a lot

I think it's pretty simple.

All fixed counter, meaning those that don't get extra benefits if you crit, like Caecus usually does with his two cost doesn't benefit, meanwhile his other skills benefit
that part is clear ye but it is just the wording that its weird
something like counter gained
and not counter dealt
be prepared, it will change next patch
aight thanks
